title: No Elytra Rocket Boosting
description: A simple data pack that does one thing: disables elytra rocket boosting
body:
# No Elytra Rocket Boosting

A simple Minecraft: Java Edition data pack that does what it says on the tin. When a player tries to use a firework rocket boost while flying with an elytra, the elytra will break and give a message to the player.

Use the following command to toggle this functionality:
```
/function no_elytra_rocket_boosting:toggle_elytra_boosting
```
